courseStructure.title: 1) Foundations & Account Setup
topics: Regions/AZs/edge locations, endpoints, shared responsibility
Account setup: MFA, budgets, billing alarms, cost allocation tags
AWS CLI/SDK, named profiles, IAM Identity Center (SSO) basics
Basic IAM credential hygiene

courseStructure.title: 2) Identity & Access (IAM, Identity Center, Organizations)
topics: IAM users/roles/policies, least privilege, permission boundaries
Access Analyzer, credential report, IAM best practices
Identity Center: users/groups, permission sets, SSO apps, SCIM basics
Organizations: multi-account strategy, OUs, SCPs, consolidated billing, tagging standards

courseStructure.title: 3) Networking (VPC)
topics: CIDR planning, public/private subnets, route tables
IGW, NAT GW vs NAT instance
NACL vs Security Groups
VPC endpoints (Gateway/Interface), PrivateLink
VPC peering vs Transit Gateway
Hybrid connectivity: Site-to-Site VPN, Direct Connect

courseStructure.title: 4) Compute (EC2, Auto Scaling, ELB)
topics: Instance families, AMIs, user-data, instance profiles
On-demand vs spot vs Savings Plans basics
ELB: ALB vs NLB vs GWLB, target groups, health checks
Auto Scaling: policies, lifecycle hooks, warm pools

courseStructure.title: 5) Storage (Core AWS Storage)
topics: S3: buckets/prefixes, versioning, lifecycle, replication, encryption (SSE-S3/SSE-KMS/client-side)
S3 Access Points, VPC-only access patterns, presigned URLs
CloudFront fundamentals (for data delivery/use cases too)
EBS (types/snapshots), EFS, FSx (Windows/Lustre/ONTAP/OpenZFS)

courseStructure.title: 6) Databases (Core)
topics: RDS engines, Multi-AZ, read replicas, backups, Performance Insights
Aurora provisioned + serverless v2, Aurora replicas, global concepts
DynamoDB: PK/SK design, GSIs/LSIs, streams, TTL, DAX, capacity modes
ElastiCache, OpenSearch basics

courseStructure.title: 7) App Integration (Messaging/Eventing)
topics: SNS, SQS (Standard/FIFO), DLQs, retries, idempotency
EventBridge: event buses, rules, pipes
Step Functions: Standard vs Express
Amazon MQ basics (when needed)

courseStructure.title: 8) Serverless
topics: Lambda: concurrency, layers, provisioned vs on-demand, event sources
API Gateway (REST/HTTP/WebSocket) basics
SAM vs CDK overview

courseStructure.title: 9) Containers
topics: ECR basics
ECS (EC2/Fargate), service discovery, autoscaling
EKS basics, node groups, IRSA basics
CodeDeploy blue/green basics (when relevant)

courseStructure.title: 10) Observability & Ops
topics: CloudWatch metrics/logs/alarms/log insights
CloudTrail (org trail) + basic audit practices
AWS Health basics
Systems Manager: Session Manager, Patch Manager, Inventory, Automation runbooks

courseStructure.title: 11) Security & Governance (Core)
topics: KMS, Secrets Manager, Parameter Store
AWS Config + conformance packs
GuardDuty, Security Hub, Macie, Inspector
WAF & Shield basics
Tagging/resource governance basics

courseStructure.title: Phase A2 — Data Engineering Core (Associate “Data Engineer” focus)
12) Data Engineering Fundamentals
topics: Batch vs streaming (ordering, late events, replay)
ETL vs ELT, incremental loads, watermarking
CDC concepts (inserts/updates/deletes), idempotency patterns
Data SLAs/SLOs, backfills, reprocessing strategies

courseStructure.title: 13) Data Lake / Lakehouse Architecture
topics: S3 lake layout: bronze/silver/gold, naming standards
Partitioning strategy (by date/org/region), pruning
Small files problem + compaction patterns
File formats: Parquet/ORC/Avro; schema evolution

courseStructure.title: 14) Data Modeling for Analytics
topics: Dimensional modeling (star/snowflake)
Facts/dimensions, surrogate keys
Slowly changing dimensions (SCD0/1/2)
Aggregations + rollups

courseStructure.title: 15) Ingestion & Data Movement (Critical for Data Engg)
topics: DMS: full load + CDC ongoing replication, validation approaches
Kinesis Data Streams (producer/consumer patterns)
Amazon Data Firehose delivery to S3/Redshift/OpenSearch (+ transforms)
MSK (Managed Kafka) basics (topics/partitions/consumer groups)
AWS Glue Schema Registry for stream schema enforcement
AWS DataSync (file transfer) + AWS Transfer Family (SFTP/FTPS/FTP)
Snowball family overview (bulk offline import) optional but useful

courseStructure.title: 16) Catalog, Governance, and Access Control (Data Platform)
topics: AWS Glue Data Catalog (databases/tables/partitions)
Lake Formation: permissions, LF-Tags, row/column security, cross-account sharing
Amazon DataZone: data portal, discovery, subscriptions, governed access workflows
Cross-account patterns: resource sharing, central governance account model

courseStructure.title: 17) Transformation & Processing (Engines)
topics: AWS Glue ETL: Spark jobs, crawlers, job parameters, retries
Glue Studio vs script, dynamic frames vs dataframes
Glue DataBrew (no-code transforms) use cases
EMR (Spark/Hive/Trino) when to use vs Glue
Lambda transforms for light jobs / event-driven transforms
Managed Flink (stream processing) optional/advanced

courseStructure.title: 18) Query & Analytics Layer
topics: Athena: partitioning, CTAS, performance tuning basics
Redshift: RA3/serverless concepts, dist/sort keys basics, Spectrum concepts
OpenSearch for log/search analytics
QuickSight: datasets, SPICE, refresh patterns

courseStructure.title: 19) Open Table Formats (Modern Lakehouse)
topics: Apache Iceberg fundamentals: snapshots, schema evolution, time travel
Athena + Iceberg read/write patterns
Redshift + Iceberg patterns
(Optional comparison) Hudi/Delta concepts

courseStructure.title: 20) Data Quality & Testing (Often Missing — include it)
topics: AWS Glue Data Quality / Deequ concepts
Rule sets: completeness, uniqueness, referential, range checks, freshness
Data contracts basics (schema + expectations)
Unit tests for transforms + “data tests” gating deployments

courseStructure.title: 21) Data Operations (Keep It Running)
topics: Glue job bookmarks for incremental processing
Backfill playbooks: parameterized reruns, reprocessing windows
Operational dashboards: pipeline success rate, lag, cost metrics
Incident handling for data pipelines (triage + rollback strategies)

courseStructure.title: 22) Infrastructure as Code & DevOps
topics: CloudFormation vs CDK vs SAM; Terraform basics
CI/CD: CodePipeline/CodeBuild/CodeDeploy or GitHub Actions to AWS
Artifact versioning, promotion across environments (dev/qa/prod)
Blue/green + canary, feature flags basics

courseStructure.title: 23) Orchestration & Scheduling (Data Pipelines Need a “Brain”)
topics: Step Functions orchestration patterns
EventBridge scheduler/rules + event-driven pipelines
Amazon MWAA (Managed Airflow) for DAG orchestration
Glue triggers/workflows, dependency management, retries, SLAs

courseStructure.title: 24) Observability for Data Platforms
topics: Central logging + metrics strategy
Pipeline-level metrics (freshness, volume anomalies, lag)
CloudTrail Lake patterns for audit analytics
Data lineage concepts (high-level)

courseStructure.title: 25) Performance + Cost Optimization (FinOps for Data)
topics: S3 lifecycle + storage class optimization
Athena optimization (partitioning, columnar formats, CTAS)
Glue/EMR tuning basics (DPUs, executors, shuffle)
Kinesis/MSK cost levers
Redshift cost/perf levers; concurrency scaling/serverless basics
CUR (Cost & Usage Report) → Athena/QuickSight chargeback/showback

courseStructure.title: 26) Security at Scale (Enterprise)
topics: KMS key strategy, rotation, envelope encryption concepts
Secrets mgmt at scale (Secrets Manager/SSM), rotation patterns
Org-wide detective controls: GuardDuty/Security Hub/Macie
SCP guardrails + permission boundaries
Data governance operating model (ownership, approvals, tagging enforcement)

courseStructure.title: 27) Architecture & Multi-Account at Scale
topics: Control Tower landing zone, account vending, baseline roles
Central logging/security accounts, shared services patterns
Well-Architected for data platforms
Resiliency patterns: multi-AZ, multi-region lake strategy

courseStructure.title: 28) Backup, DR, and Resiliency
topics: AWS Backup basics + cross-region copy
S3 replication strategies
Aurora Global DB concepts
DR strategies: pilot light / warm standby / active-active

courseStructure.title: 29) Data Sharing & Collaboration
topics: Lake Formation cross-account sharing
DataZone sharing workflows
Redshift sharing concepts (if used)

courseStructure.title: Specialty Tracks (Optional Add-ons)
topics: Advanced Networking: TGW, Global Accelerator, hybrid patterns
Advanced Security: SRA patterns, detective/preventive/response automation
Streaming Advanced: Flink, exactly-once concepts, advanced Kafka patterns
Search/Observability: OpenSearch pipelines, log analytics, SIEM basics
AI/ML Integration: SageMaker pipelines, Bedrock + RAG over governed datasets
